workflow.description: Absolute path to the workflow file.

outputs.description: URLs or local paths to produced artifacts.

outputs_by_node.description: Cloud --wait only: the same artifact URLs grouped by the node id that produced them.

outputs_by_item.description: Cloud --wait only: artifact URLs grouped by blueprint foreach item (via the compose item_map). Empty object when no item_map exists.

warnings.description: Non-fatal diagnostics about the run (e.g. partial_execution when the cloud pruned an output branch). Empty when none.
